summary: Iteration 4 testing complete. Backend: 13/13 pytest passed for new POST /api/intake (full payload, minimal payload, contact_messages mirror, missing-required 422, invalid-email 422, empty-string 422) plus regression on /api/contact, /api/newsletter, /api/telemetry, /api/github/repos, /api/chat. Frontend: LogoIntro renders ATLAS.VEX brand on first load, auto-dismisses, sessionStorage 'atlasvex.intro.shown' gate prevents re-render on reload, skip button works. ChatBot intake state machine verified end-to-end: chat→intake→done with header pill transitioning online·co-pilot → intake mode·live → brief logged; chips render for 3 steps, email free-input on step 4, POST /api/intake returns Reference id shown in green success bubble, 'new query' returns to chat mode, free-form LLM chat still works. No console errors.
critical_code_review_comments: ChatBot.jsx: dedicated <input type='email'> for intake step 4 only enforces HTML5 validation client-side; backend correctly rejects invalid emails with 422 — current behavior shows 'value is not a valid email address' from detail[0].msg in error bubble (verified by code path, not exercised in UI). Acceptable.

server.py submit_intake mirrors to contact_messages with name='Atlas Vex Lead' / email='intake@atlasvex.io' fallbacks when not provided — fine for unified inbox but operators should be aware these synthetic addresses appear in /api/contact listings.
LogoIntro: clicking anywhere on the overlay (onClick={skip} on the root motion.div) also dismisses — intentional UX but worth confirming with product. Skip button still works as primary control.
test_credentials: n/a — no auth in this app
seed_data_creation: TEST_-prefixed contact + newsletter + intake records inserted via API during test run; safe to leave (no production data touched).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 4 added /api/intake (lead intake, mirrored to contact_messages collection) + LogoIntro cinematic animation gated by sessionStorage 'atlasvex.intro.shown'. Test file /app/backend/tests/test_atlas_vex_v4.py covers intake + regression on contact/newsletter/telemetry/github/chat (1 LLM call). For LogoIntro frontend tests, clear sessionStorage to force render; set the key to '1' to suppress for subsequent UI tests. ChatBot intake state machine: mode in {chat, intake, done}, INTAKE_STEPS with 3 option-chip steps + 1 free-input email step. data-testids: logo-intro, logo-intro-skip, chatbot-toggle, chatbot-panel, chatbot-start-intake, intake-options, intake-free-input, intake-free-submit, chatbot-input, chatbot-send.
